title.en: In that case, they may be the ones who break th...

content.en:
Several Ultimate Ancient Demons in the main department of Mother Arrow were very excited, silently guarding the Stygian Ancient Demons to ensure that her breakthrough process would not be disturbed by the outside world.

And quickly.

Many peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses knew that the Stygian Ancient Demon had successfully broken through, and they were envious one by one.

There were even a few peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who regretted it, they felt that if they had attracted some more Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, or even worked harder, they might be able to get more space-time Ancient Demon Pillar Qi Luck, so as to surpass the power of the Qi Luck of the Stygian Ancient Demon.

In that case, they may be the ones who break through now!

The Stygian Ancient Demon broke through to the ultimate Ancient Demon, far surpassing them in terms of life level, strength, and status.

And they can't be compared with the Stygian Ancient Demon in the future, it's not a grade.

How does this make them not envious?

......

Eagle Ministry.

this day.

Ye Tian received an invitation letter from the main department of Aluo's mother.

"The Stygian Ancient Demon has broken through to the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, but this was not an unusual thing, after all, the success rate of the Stygian Ancient Demon breakthrough was at least close to half, and it was normal to be able to break through with a little luck.

And after the breakthrough, the Stygian Ancient Demon is the ultimate Ancient Demon, and such a great event is naturally to hold a grand banquet, inviting the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses of the major tribes 463 or even the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

Not only was he invited, but some peak ancient demon-level powerhouses such as Proz and Golden Slayer Ancient Demon were also invited.

After another period of time, the banquet of the Stygian Ancient Demon began, and Ye Tian, Proz, and the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon all came to the new dojo of the Stygian Ancient Demon, the main department of the Arrow Mother.

Here, Ye Tian saw a lot of Ancient Demon-level powerhouses, most of which belonged to the Ancient Demon-level powerhouses of the Aluo Mother's main department.

And the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, Ye Tian has sensed too much, there are at least two hundred, maybe this is most of the peak ancient demon-level powerhouses in the main department of the Luo mother.

And the number of top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses is even more, and it is not conspicuous to put it here.

However, Ye Tian's arrival still attracted the attention of many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, after all, Ye Tian's record in the Huoxi space-time battlefield was too strong at the beginning, and he would definitely be invincible at the peak of ancient demon-level powerhouses in the future.

Therefore, many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses came over to make friends with Ye Tian.

Of course, there were also some peak ancient demon-level powerhouses who didn't care about Ye Tian.

It was the Golden Ancient Demon who saw Ye Tian, and his eyes showed anger and hatred in the depths of his eyes, but he didn't dare to show it.

Soon.

Ye Tian saw the Immortal Ancient Demon who had just come out of the customs, and at this time, her aura was nearly a hundred times stronger than in the past, and that terrifying aura made many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses tremble slightly.

This is the ultimate Ancient Demon-level powerhouse, and his strength far surpasses that of the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse.

"Meet the Ancient Demon of the Stygian!"

A group of ancient demon-level powerhouses said respectfully.

"Everyone has come to the banquet where the deity breaks through the ultimate ancient demon, and the deity is very happy. After the feast, there will be a sermon explaining the perception of the Buddha-figure's breakthrough. "The Ancient Demon Path.

"Thank you, Lord Stygian!"

Many ancient demon-level powerhouses.

At the banquet.

A large number of rare ingredients and drinks are supplied, allowing many ancient demon-level powerhouses to taste, and many of these ingredients can even improve their cultivation and comprehension, and the value of these things is enough to make a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse exhaust half of his worth.

However, the Stygian Ancient Demon broke through to the ultimate ancient demon level realm and became one of the highest levels of the Luo Mother's main department, which can mobilize the resources of the Luo Mother's main department, which is nothing to the Luo Mother's main department.

Time passed slowly, and the banquet was finally over.

After the banquet, the Ancient Demon began to preach, and many Ancient Demon-level realms listened one after another.

Ye Tian also listened carefully, after all, the experience and perception of a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse breaking through to become an ultimate ancient demon was worth learning from him.

After all, he also wants to break through to the ultimate ancient demon in the future, so he naturally wants to know more about the mysteries (aheh) in order to increase the success rate of the breakthrough.

The Stygian Ancient Demon began to speak, and the consciousness of many Ancient Demon-level powerhouses seemed to be pulled into a realm of time and space, and he saw many mysterious changes, and saw the picture of the peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse impacting the bottleneck.

This way of preaching is straightforward and simple, but it is not easy to grasp the mystery.

I don't know how long it took for the Ancient Demon to finally finish his sermon.

However, most of the Ancient Demon-level powerhouses did not understand one ten-thousandth, but there were also some Ancient Demon-level powerhouses who had some gains.

Ye Tian gained a lot, at least he had more knowledge of how to impact the Ultimate Ancient Demon Realm, but this knowledge was not enough to increase the success rate of breakthroughs.

After that, many ancient demon-level powerhouses retreated one by one.

"Heavenly Ancient Demon, you stay. "

The voice of the Ancient Demon of the Dark Elegance entered Ye Tian's will.

Ye Tian didn't leave and stayed.

After the other ancient demon-level powerhouses left, in a large hall, only Ye Tian and the Stygian Ancient Demon remained.

"Heavenly Ancient Demon, the deity was able to win the battle of luck, and you have a great credit. Say, what reward do you want?"

In the past, she didn't have much net worth, and she used it to win over many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, but now that she has broken through to become the ultimate ancient demon, she really has to give Ye Tian some compensation.

"Lord Stygian, I want the Nightmare Rama Flower. "

Ye Tian said.

"Do you want the Nightmare Rama Flower?" the Stygian Ancient Demon frowned: "This thing will affect your foundation, if you refine it, the foundation will be completely wasted, and now you are afraid that you will not even be able to break through the peak Ancient Demon level realm." "

Ye Tian hurriedly explained, "Lord Ancient Demon, I want to study this thing, and now I have some results, maybe it can reduce the side effects, and it will be no problem for me to break through to the peak Ancient Demon level." As for not being able to break through the Ultimate Ancient Demon, I don't count on it. After all, I come from a small tribe, and it is unlikely that I will break through to the ultimate ancient demon. "

His explanation was very reasonable, and when the ancient demon heard it, he also felt that it made sense, and he didn't suspect anything.

"Okay, but the Nightmare Rama Flower is very rare, and there are not many of them in the main department of the Arrow Mother, I can promise you two, no more. "The Ancient Demon Path.

"Thank you, Lord Stygian!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Two Nightmare Rama Flowers, if this is given to him, his strength will inevitably skyrocket. []

Soon after.

The two Nightmare Rama Flowers were sent to the Eagle Department and handed over to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian immediately announced the retreat and cultivation.
